c1.descriptionRaw: Fires 2 additional arrows per <color=#FFD780FF>Aimed Shot</color>, each dealing 33% of the original arrow's DMG.
c1.name: Splitting Gales

c2.descriptionRaw:
<color=#FFD780FF>Skyward Sonnet</color> decreases opponents' <color=#80FFD7FF>Anemo RES</color> and Physical RES by 12% for 10s.
Opponents launched by <color=#FFD780FF>Skyward Sonnet</color> suffer an additional 12% <color=#80FFD7FF>Anemo RES</color> and Physical RES decrease while airborne.
c2.name: Breeze of Reminiscence

c3.descriptionRaw:
Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Wind's Grand Ode</color> by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
c3.name: Ode to Thousand Winds

c4.descriptionRaw: When Venti picks up an Elemental Orb or Particle, he receives a 25% <color=#80FFD7FF>Anemo DMG Bonus</color> for 10s.
c4.name: Hurricane of Freedom

c5.descriptionRaw:
Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Skyward Sonnet</color> by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
c5.name: Concerto dal Cielo

c6.descriptionRaw:
Targets who take DMG from <color=#FFD780FF>Wind's Grand Ode</color> have their <color=#80FFD7FF>Anemo RES</color> decreased by 20%.
If an Elemental Absorption occurred, then their RES towards the corresponding Element is also decreased by 20%.
c6.name: Storm of Defiance

profile.description: One of the many bards of Mondstadt, who freely wanders the city's streets and alleys.
profile.name: Venti
profile.title: Windborne Bard

labels: Windsunder Arrow DMG|{param12:F1P} Normal Attack DMG

combat1.descriptionRaw:
<color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>
Performs up to 6 consecutive shots with a bow.

<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>
Performs a more precise <color=#FFD780FF>Aimed Shot</color> with increased DMG.
While aiming, favorable winds will accumulate on the arrowhead. A fully charged wind arrow will deal <color=#80FFD7FF>Anemo DMG</color>.

<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>
Fires off a shower of arrows in mid-air before falling and striking the ground, dealing AoE DMG upon impact.
combat1.name: Divine Marksmanship

combat2.descriptionRaw: #O wind upon which all hymns and songs fly, bear these earth-walkers up into the sky! {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Press}{LAYOUT_PS#Press} Summons a Wind Domain at the opponent's location, dealing AoE Anemo DMG and launching opponents into the air. Hold Summons an even larger Wind Domain with Venti as the epicenter, dealing AoE Anemo DMG and launching affected opponents into the air. After unleashing the Hold version of this ability, Venti rides the wind into the air. Opponents hit by Skyward Sonnet will fall to the ground slowly. In the days when gods and men walked the earth together, the heavens were filled with countless songs. This melody has long since been forgotten.
combat2.name: Skyward Sonnet

combat3.descriptionRaw: Fires off an arrow made of countless coalesced winds, creating a huge Stormeye that sucks in opponents and deals continuous Anemo DMG. Elemental Absorption If the Stormeye comes into contact with Hydro/Pyro/Cryo/Electro, it will deal additional elemental DMG of that type. Elemental Absorption may only occur once per use. Many hymns written in praise of the Anemo Archon have been lost to time. This one sings of his mastery over the wind.
combat3.name: Wind's Grand Ode

passive1.descriptionRaw: Holding <color=#FFD780FF>Skyward Sonnet</color> creates an upcurrent that lasts for 20s.
passive1.name: Embrace of Winds

passive2.descriptionRaw:
Regenerates 15 Energy for Venti after the effects of <color=#FFD780FF>Wind's Grand Ode</color> end.
If an Elemental Absorption occurred, this also restores 15 Energy to all characters of that corresponding element in the party.
passive2.name: Stormeye

passive3.descriptionRaw:
Decreases gliding Stamina consumption for your own party members by 20%.
Not stackable with Passive Talents that provide the exact same effects.
passive3.name: Windrider

passive4.descriptionRaw:
After completing <color=#FFD780FF>Witch's Homework: Of the Waking of Wind</color>, Venti will become a <color=#FFD780FF>Hexerei</color> character. When the party includes at least 2 Hexerei characters, you will gain the <color=#FFD780FF>Hexerei: Secret Rite</color> effect, which enhances Hexerei characters.

<color=#FFD780FF>Hexerei: Secret Rite</color>
While the Stormeye created by the Elemental Burst <color=#FFD780FF>Wind's Grand Ode</color> is active, for 4s after a nearby active character triggers a Swirl reaction, that character's DMG is increased by 50%, and Venti's Stormeye deals 135% of its original DMG.
passive4.name: Witch's Eve Rite: Temporal Wind's Eulogy
